mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: MCP Server - Tool Listener
mcp:tool-listener.name: search_api_documentation
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Search Confluence documentation to retrieve MuleSoft API details including endpoints, request methods, downstream systems, and integration flow descriptions. Use this when API name is known or when investigating how an integration works.

set-variable.doc:name: Extract keyword

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- (payload.results default []) map ((page) -> do { var raw = page.body.view.value default '' var withStructure = raw replace /<\/tr>/ with '\n' replace /<\/td>/ with ' | ' replace /<\/th>/ with ' | ' replace /<br\s*\/?>/ with '\n' replace / / with ' ' replace /&/ with '&' var stripped = withStructure replace /\<[^>]+\>/ with '' var clean = stripped replace /[ \t]{2,}/ with ' ' var truncated = if ( sizeOf(clean) > 3000 ) clean[0 to 3000] ++ '...' else clean --- { title: page.title, url: 'https://' ++ p('atlassian.host') ++ '/wiki' ++ (page."_links".webui default ''), content: truncated } })]
set-variable.doc:name: Extract and clean pages

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload

set-variable.value:
#[(vars.pages map ((page, idx) -> '--- PAGE ' ++ (idx + 1) ++ ': ' ++ page.title ++ ' ---
' ++ 'URL: ' ++ page.url ++ '
' ++ page.content ++ '
')) joinBy '
']
set-variable.doc:name: Build context

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (vars.questionMeta.isShiftQuestion) // ── SHIFT / ROTA PROMPT ────────────────────── 'You are a precise shift schedule assistant.

' ++ 'The rota table has these columns: start date, end date, timing, name.
' ++ 'A person is ON SHIFT if ALL of these are true:
' ++ ' 1. The query DATE falls between their start date and end date (inclusive).
' ++ ' 2. The query TIME falls within their timing window.

' ++ 'RULES:
' ++ '1. Compare dates carefully. Normalise all date formats before comparing.
' ++ '2. Answer ONLY from the rota table provided — do not guess.
' ++ '3. If no one matches, say: No one is scheduled on shift at that time.
' ++ '4. Keep your answer short — just the persons name and their shift window.

' ++ 'ROTA TABLE CONTENT:
' ++ vars.context ++ '
' ++ 'QUESTION: ' ++ vars.question ++ '

' ++ 'Reply with JSON only, no markdown fences:
' ++ '{"answer":"...","source_page":"...","source_url":"..."}'
else
// ── GENERAL EXTRACTION PROMPT ──────────────── "You are a precise information extraction assistant.

" ++ "RULES:
" ++ "1. Answer ONLY from the Confluence content provided below.
" ++ '2. If the answer is in a table, read each row carefully and extract the correct value.
' ++ '3. If the answer is not found, say: "This information was not found in the Confluence pages." 
' ++ '4. Do NOT guess or use outside knowledge.
' ++ '5. Keep your answer short and direct.

' ++ 'CONFLUENCE CONTENT:
' ++ vars.context ++ '
' ++ 'QUESTION: ' ++ vars.question ++ '

' ++ 'Reply with JSON only — no markdown fences:
' ++ '{"answer":"...","source_page":"...","source_url":"..."}'

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var raw = payload.response --- read(raw, "application/json")]
set-payload.doc:name: Shape response
